dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, look at what they did. The {quest_focus} {quest_focus_was} hit last night. I know exactly who is responsible: the {quest_threat}, born out of {quest_origin}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I need you to {quest_action}. {quest_ally} saw someone fleeing {location_hint} just after it happened. That witness knows what really went down: find them and get the truth before the {quest_threat} silences them.
dialogueChunks.outro: They destroyed the {quest_stakes} out of spite. I will see justice done, one way or another.

dialogueChunks.intro: Someone targeted us deliberately, {player_name}. The {quest_threat} sabotaged the {quest_focus} and now the {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} paying the price.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I will not let this stand. Someone needs to {quest_action} {quest_time_pressure}. {target_npc} near the {quest_focus} may have witnessed what happened. Track them down {location_hint} and find out what they know before the trail goes cold.
dialogueChunks.outro: This was no accident. This was a crime, and I want the one responsible to answer for it.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the {quest_threat} broke into the {quest_focus} and took everything of value. This was not random: it was born out of {quest_origin} and aimed straight at the {quest_stakes}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I need you to {quest_action}. The trail leads {location_hint}. {quest_ally} says the thieves are still nearby. Track them down and put an end to this: the {enemy_type} they hired will not let you pass quietly.
dialogueChunks.outro: Bring back what was taken and there will be {quest_reward_hint} for your trouble. But more importantly, bring back our dignity.
